rootCause.score58: Initial UI and empty artifact mapping used fallbackUiState/fallback completion.
rootCause.fallbackSafeDefault: Readiness and risks defaulted to fallback_safe_default even before any real run or PM input.

emptyStateRules.noRun: Show not_started with 0 percent and no readiness details.
emptyStateRules.noInput: Empty requirement with no raw PM input or DSL JSON maps to emptyUiState.

scoreRules.intermediate: preserve existing artifact and skill scores

fallbackBoundary.allowed: real artifact/generation context with incomplete fields
fallbackBoundary.blocked: initial empty page, no run, no PM input, no artifacts

targeted.command: npm test -- src/adapters/dslArtifactAdapter.test.js src/App.test.jsx -t "true empty|no DSL artifacts|fallback suggestion|completion score|Enter|single|完成态|sends PM answers|cleans up"

npmTest.reason: Existing dirty server/services/skillOrchestrator.js references CLARIFICATION_TOTAL_QUESTIONS after the constant was removed.

testServer.reason: Same CLARIFICATION_TOTAL_QUESTIONS ReferenceError in server tests.

reworkRecommendation: Frontend empty-state fix does not need rework; resolve the existing server clarification-flow dirty changes before commit/push.
